The '''Alliance of Independent Systems''' was an interplanetary government that was headed by a [[Chairman of the Alliance|Chairman]]. [[Mace Windy]] served as [[Warlord to the Chairman of the Alliance of Independent Systems]].<ref name="Making of" />

==Behind the scenes==
This entity was created in [[George Lucas]]'s earliest writing about the Star Wars universe, the [[Journal of the Whills, Part I|''Journal of the Whills (Part) I'']], an in-universe narrative written by [[Chuiee Two Thorpe]] of [[Kissel]], Mace's [[Padawan|padawaan learner]].<ref name="Making of" />

Though the [[Galactic Empire]] was always a villainous force in the final script, in the [[The Star Wars rough draft|rough draft]] script, the [[Jedi-Bendu|Jedi]] served the [[Emperor (The Star Wars)|Emperors]] until fairly recently, and the [[Galactic Republic]] had not yet been invented. Instead, the pre-existing [[Galactic Empire (The Star Wars)|Empire]] had declined into barbarism and decadence.<ref name="Making of" />

==Sources==
